title: Better D-Hand
description: This mod simulates a hotbar slot being clicked and opening your inventory.
body:
# **Better D-Hand**
Better D-Hand is a simple lightweight mod that lets you change hotbar slots and go into your inventory with the click of one button.

Not a hack: No unfair advantages (e.g., aim assist, X-ray), but use responsibly.

Note this mod is bannable in some servers as it does simulate pressing 2 keys at once.

## What Does Better D-Hand Do?
If you press E to open your inventory your game will simulate you pressing 4 (customizable with mod menu) and then E. This protects you from popping a totem while in your inventory if one is in the slot.

## Issues
If you have an issues or would like to share you ideas with me on how to make this better feel free to comment on my github.
